title: 1.2: Tests orchestrated multi-enumerator scan completion, asserting scanner.scan_completed is True

1.19: Tests CC positive response handling, asserting len(tc.results_with_positive_response) > 0

3.2: Uses non-empty UTScapy section header titles, asserting each '=' header has text after '='
